consumerTone: plain English; educational organ-system and complex-condition genetics context only; no diagnosis, personal risk estimate, symptom inference, lab/imaging/vital/organ-function inference, severity, prognosis, screening, prevention, testing, treatment, medication, supplement, diet, exercise, clearance, emergency, all-clear, or clinical actionability claims

genomeEvidence.observedValue: validated chronic-pain genetic model, calibrated PRS, ancestry applicability metadata, pain-threshold model, analgesic-response model, opioid-response model, clinical calibration, and local risk calculations unavailable in this fixture; public sample PDF risk cards, percentiles, recommendation rows, impact/evidence ratings, and visible variant tables observed for output structure

genomeEvidence.gene: Chronic Pain DNA Report clinical and professional context
genomeEvidence.observedValue: pain diagnosis, pain location, symptom history, injury history, mental-health context, medication list, opioid or analgesic response evidence, professional interpretation, and personal clinical context unavailable in this fixture; public sample PDF observed separately as output-structure evidence

genomeEvidence.gene: Chronic Pain DNA Report organ-system context
genomeEvidence.observedValue: neurologic exam, inflammatory labs, imaging, musculoskeletal evaluation, disease-specific testing, treatment context, prevention context, disability context, and actionability context unavailable in this fixture; public sample PDF observed separately as output-structure evidence

inputManifest.source: synthetic unavailable-model evidence for chronic-pain-dna-report validation

missingInputPolicy: Report unavailable chronic-pain model calibration, pain history, pain location, symptoms, medication response, opioid or analgesic response, labs, imaging, clinical context, professional review, and complete local risk model explicitly; do not infer pain diagnosis, pain threshold, pain cause, pain severity, treatment need, medication need, supplement need, exercise guidance, or clinical actionability from genotype alone or sample-only rows.
